name: The Silver Huntress - The End of a Hunt
description:
“Even if we won't meet again... at least in death we will be reunited.”

[Echo Playback Playing]

"Selene..."

"No need to say it Shirose, we both knew this would happen eventually."

"But-!"

"Sshh... it's alright. Even if this may be the last time we see eachother, I'm glad you persisted without me."

"Just promise me... you'll be able to live on without me for now on..."

Thud

"Selene? Selene?!"

"No no no... not like this... wa-wake up!"

"..."

"I'm sorry I was late."

[Echo Playback Ended]

Any factions - any pov

Source= https://x.com/kadence2727

P.S. This was a bot kept privated for a while but I figured it would be a waste to just leave it here. Plus not like there's a lot of Shirose bots anyways.
creator: Stabba
